author: Yevhen Shramov
name: 12L + 24min + Vocab1792 + FlashMuon + LinearScaleInit + XSA5LastGated + RReLU2 + Int6AWQMixedBits
blurb: 24 min of train: 12-layer large-vocab branch with Flash Muon, XSA on the last 5 layers with only the final XSA layer gated, linear-by-depth scale init, RReLU2 MLP, late EMA plus post-train best-choice selection, and mixed-bit int6 AWQ + lzma export. The default path keeps most tensors at int6 and promotes selected sensitive tensors to int8 via QUANT_INT8_NAME_PATTERNS (default: tok_emb.weight,lm_head.weight)
